ordering_tie_rng_fp.floating_point: baseline records numerical drift against genuine NetworkX for later equality envelope
ordering_tie_rng_fp.node_order: nodes are inserted as range(n); RCM/relabel order follows each implementation's public algorithm
ordering_tie_rng_fp.rng: graph generation is deterministic; watts uses seed=37
ordering_tie_rng_fp.tie_breaks: proof compares final keyed outputs; no new tie-breaking lever is active in baseline
